title: Doctor's Best High Absorption Magnesium Glycinate Lysinate 100% Chelated, Non-GMO, Vegan, Gluten Free, Soy Free, 100 mg, 240 Tablets
bullet_points: PATENTED CHELATED FORM: Uses TRAACS® magnesium glycinate lysinate chelate, a patented form that is more bioavailable than magnesium oxide
SUPPORTS BONE DENSITY: Magnesium plays a critical role in bone formation and may help maintain healthy bone density
PROMOTES RELAXATION AND SLEEP: Magnesium is involved in hundreds of enzymatic reactions and supports healthy muscle and nerve function
THIRD-PARTY TESTED: Every batch is independently tested for purity and potency; certificate of analysis available on request
CLEAN FORMULA: Non-GMO, vegan, gluten free, soy free — no artificial colors or preservatives
